item.title: The Future of Books We Absolutely Do Not Want is Already Here.
item.description: There is one story in the world of books and reading right now: AI. And a recent piece in The New York Times is probably our most stark vision yet not...

item.title: Book Riot’s Deals of the Day for February 9, 2026
item.description: A graveyard full of secrets, a vampire story, an unconventional snake-handler, and more of today's best book deals.

item.title: Read Harder This Black History Month
item.description: These seven books by Black authors complete the first seven tasks of the 2026 Read Harder Challenge, from microhistories to gothic novels.

item.title: Eight Twisted Noir Superhero Stories
item.description: These eight great noir superhero stories are full of crime, revenge, and awesome superheroes, from classic comics to modern day graphic novels.

item.title: About that New Michael Connelly Podcast
item.description: The Audies and Edgar Allen Poe Award finalists have been announced, plus adaptation news, and more
